intent: Two-screen PSD2 strong-customer-authentication flow: credentials on screen one, OTP confirmation on screen two with explicit forward and cancel navigation.
notes: Tier-1 banking baseline (PSD2 SCA): models the canonical online-banking entry path. Screen one collects Anmeldename plus a fixed-length numeric PIN; the Anmelden button navigates to the 2FA screen. Screen two collects a 6-digit time-limited OTP and provides both Confirm (no navigation, terminal) and Cancel (returns to login). Two screens and two navigation edges anchor the lower bound of multi-screen, time-bounded credential flows.
